h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to rely on the sleeve to define the label positions.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: [sets the cards against the printed parts, ignoring the shifted sleeve]
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner demonstrates understanding of the fixed tile positions by ignoring the rotated sleeve and placing the cards correctly.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: [lifts the sleeve, rotates it half a turn, and sets it down so the windows miss the printed parts] Now the sleeve is wrong. What stayed fixed on the tile: top mark, center letter, printed name, bottom decimal. Read the four labels back from those positions.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor physically rotates the sleeve to disrupt the learner's reliance on it, pointing out what remains fixed on the tile.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityEvidence: [lifts the sleeve, rotates it half a turn, and sets it down so the windows miss the printed parts] Now the sleeve is wrong. What stayed fixed on the tile: top mark, center letter, printed name, bottom decimal. Read the four labels back from those positions.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: The physical manipulation of the sleeve is a highly fitted device that successfully shifts the learner's focus to the tile's inherent structure.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: [sets the cards against the printed parts, ignoring the shifted sleeve]
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner demonstrates understanding of the fixed tile positions by ignoring the rotated sleeve and placing the cards correctly.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor physically rotates the sleeve to disrupt the learner's reliance on it, pointing out what remains fixed on the tile.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor physically rotates the sleeve to disrupt the learner's reliance on it, pointing out what remains fixed on the tile.

What stayed fixed on the tile: top mark, center letter, printed name, bottom decimal. Read the four labels back from those positions.
tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: The physical manipulation of the sleeve is a highly fitted device that successfully shifts the learner's focus to the tile's inherent structure.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to identify the sources of the forces acting on the cart and place the labels accordingly.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: [moves the hand, table, and Earth cards beside the matching arrows] Hand: force on cart from hand. Table: force on cart from table. Earth: force on cart from Earth. The arrows show direction; the cards name the source.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully places all the source labels next to their corresponding arrows and articulates the conceptual distinction between arrow direction and force source.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The learner proceeds smoothly through the task without experiencing any breakdown or resistance, so no tutor reversal is triggered.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism was triggered or required because the learner did not experience any blockages.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent tutor uptake.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: [moves the hand, table, and Earth cards beside the matching arrows] Hand: force on cart from hand. Table: force on cart from table. Earth: force on cart from Earth. The arrows show direction; the cards name the source.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner successfully places all the source labels next to their corresponding arrows and articulates the conceptual distinction between arrow direction and force source.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent tutor uptake.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The learner proceeds smoothly through the task without experiencing any breakdown or resistance, so no tutor reversal is triggered.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The learner proceeds smoothly through the task without experiencing any breakdown or resistance, so no tutor reversal is triggered.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism was triggered or required because the learner did not experience any blockages.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to follow the tutor's step-by-step instructions to fill out the worksheet and place the bar line.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Lower box: 4, because the quarter note gets the beat. The tempo card stays outside the two boxes. If that card changes speed only, the 3 over 4 and this bar line after tile three stay unchanged, correct?
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully translates the quarter note to the numeral 4 and correctly deduces that tempo changes do not affect the time signature.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor does not reverse strategy because the learner makes no errors and experiences no breakdown.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: Lower box: 4, because the quarter note gets the beat. The tempo card stays outside the two boxes. If that card changes speed only, the 3 over 4 and this bar line after tile three stay unchanged, correct?
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner successfully translates the quarter note to the numeral 4 and correctly deduces that tempo changes do not affect the time signature.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor does not reverse strategy because the learner makes no errors and experiences no breakdown.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor does not reverse strategy because the learner makes no errors and experiences no breakdown.
